description:
What: Prototype uniqueness inference on a small program. Joint with existing Descr inference in ir_typer. Report yes/no + cost model + integration sketch.

Why: FBIP-style reuse is the headline payoff of having RC at all. Spike before committing.

CLIF impact: spike only — no production code.

Outcome: a written report attached to this ticket. Decides whether G1+ proceed.

Tests: prototype demonstrates uniqueness inference on at least one non-trivial fixture (vec rebuild + list rebuild).
title: fz-dps.G0: SPIKE — uniqueness lattice on Descr graph
